news.summary: Hsinchu, May 16, 2025 - InPsytech, a prominent company offering cutting-edge silicon intellectual property solutions, and a part of the Egis Group (6452 TWO), has recently become a partner in the prestigious Samsung SAFE™ IP Program. This partnership marks a significant achievement for InPsytech and highlights the company's dedication to innovation and excellence in the tech industry.
news.headline: InPsytech partners with Samsung SAFE™ IP Program for ONFI and UCIe IP Solutions. Joined as a member of Egis (6452 TWO) Group.

news.summary: Danish company Nordic Bioscience has announced the launch of nordicEndotrophin™ in Herlev, Denmark on May 16, 2025. This new product is a high-precision assay that can accurately measure the intact 77-amino-acid Endotrophin signaling hormone. The assay is fully automated and is available in the CAP/CLIA certified Nordic Bioscience laboratory. This advancement in technology offers selective quantification of the Endotrophin hormone, providing researchers and medical professionals with a valuable tool for analysis.
news.headline: Nordic Bioscience debuts nordicEndotrophin™ assay in Denmark, certifying 77-amino-acid Endotrophin hormone in CAP/CLIA lab.

news.summary: According to recent updates, the number of COVID-19 cases has surged to over 1.5 million worldwide, with more than 90,000 reported deaths. In the United States alone, the number of cases has surpassed 400,000, with over 14,000 deaths. Despite efforts to curb the spread of the virus through social distancing measures and lockdowns, the situation remains critical in many parts of the world. Health experts continue to emphasize the importance of following guidelines to reduce the impact of the pandemic. Governments and organizations are working tirelessly to provide medical supplies and support to those affected by the crisis. The global community is urged to stay informed, stay safe, and support each other during these challenging times.
news.headline: Youth worry about lacking crucial green skills to combat climate change.

news.summary: In the first quarter of 2025, HBC reported total operating revenues of NOK 60.9 million, marking an increase from NOK 52.4 million in Q1 of the previous year. Net operating revenues also saw a rise to NOK 60.7 million, showing a 15% growth compared to Q1 2024 (NOK 52.1 million). This improvement was fueled by the sustained expansion in the more profitable human and pet health divisions. Despite facing production limitations early in the quarter and dealing with persistent challenges in the oil market for commodities, HBC managed to boost its revenues significantly.
news.headline: Hofseth Biocare ASA's Q1 2025 financial report shows total operating revenues of NOK 60.9 million, 15% up from Q1 2024.

news.summary: On May 16, 2025, ASSA ABLOY announced its acquisition of TeleAlarm Group, a Germany-based company specializing in remote care technology for social care and home care sectors in Europe. This move by ASSA ABLOY aims to enhance its offerings in independent living solutions. Key information includes the date of the acquisition, the nature of TeleAlarm's expertise in hardware and software solutions for remote care, and the focus on enabling independent living.
news.headline: ASSA ABLOY acquires TeleAlarm Group in Germany, specializing in remote care technology for independent living.(Characters: 91)

news.summary: In San Jose, California on May 16, 2025, BOE unveiled its UB Cell technology for premium TV displays. This innovative solution combines ADS Pro advanced LCD display technology and has been redefining "perfect picture quality" since its launch in 2022. The UB Cell technology has set new standards in the industry for unparalleled visual excellence.
news.headline: BOE's UB Cell 4.0 enhances visual health with ADS Pro LCD technology, pioneering premium picture quality and eye-safe features.

news.summary: AI company Together AI has recently completed the acquisition of Refuel.ai in a move to bolster data management capabilities for AI applications. The acquisition involves the incorporation of Refuel's models into Together AI's platform to address the challenges associated with unstructured data. This strategic move is expected to significantly enhance Together AI's capabilities in handling complex data sets.
news.headline: AI provider, Together AI, bolsters capabilities with acquisition of Refuel.ai, integrating models to address unstructured data challenges.

news.summary: In May 16, 2025, Zinzino, a renowned global provider of personalized nutrition based on tests, has revealed its expansion into China through a cross-border social e-commerce strategy. This move signifies a major advancement in the company's goal of advocating for proactive health.
news.headline: Zinzino expands into China, a global leader in test-based nutrition, with a cross-border e-commerce model.Character count: 93

news.summary: Executive chairman of Strategy Inc. (NASDAQ: MSTR), Michael Saylor, recently discussed the company's ability to withstand a downturn in the cryptocurrency market. Saylor warned that if Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) were to drop by 90% and remain at that level for several years, the company could remain stable due to its large reserves of 568,840 BTC valued at around $59 billion. However, shareholders, who are highly leveraged, would face significant losses. Despite accumulating debt and preferred-stock financings to purchase more Bitcoin, Saylor remains firm in his belief that owning the most Bitcoin is key to success in the market. In a separate interview, he emphasized, "Whoever gets the most bitcoin wins. There is no other endgame." The company recently sold $580 million of dividend-paying preferred stock to fund its Bitcoin purchases.
news.headline: Strategy Inc. chairman Michael Saylor warns of shareholder suffering if Bitcoin drops 90% for 4-5 years, but remains optimistic on acquiring more Bitcoin to win.

news.summary: A leading AI-driven warehouse automation company, Robust.AI, has revealed a significant manufacturing collaboration with Hon Hai Technology Group, also known as Foxconn (TWSE:2317), the world’s biggest electronics manufacturing services provider. This venture aims to boost production of its flagship Carter™ multi-function collaborative robotics platform. The strategic partnership will empower Robust.AI to promptly meet the surging requirements from its expanding global clientele.
news.headline: Robust.AI partners with Foxconn to expand production of Carter robots for warehouse automation.Key points: Foxconn is world's largest EMS provider, Robust.AI aiming to meet growing international demand.

news.summary: A notable independent global Internet of Things (IoT) solutions provider, Wireless Logic, has recently announced the addition of General Atlantic, a reputable global investor. This comes as General Atlantic becomes a new minority shareholder in the company through the investment made from the firm’s BeyondNetZero climate growth equity fund. Despite this development, the Company's primary shareholder, Montagu, a leading mid-market private equity firm, will continue to be the majority stakeholder, reinvesting in collaboration with General Atlantic. The transaction involved in this partnership values Wireless Logic at a considerable sum.
news.headline: Wireless Logic partners with General Atlantic as a new minority shareholder, invested through BeyondNetZero fund, while Montagu retains majority ownership. Valuation undisclosed.

news.summary: The first ever use of accelerator-based boron neutron capture therapy outside of Asia has been initiated in a groundbreaking clinical trial. This trial is currently accepting patients with inoperable, locally recurrent head and neck cancer. The collaboration involves Neutron Therapeutics LLC and Helsinki. As of May 16, 2025, this innovative approach is being tested in Boston, marking a significant milestone in the medical field. This pioneering trial represents a key step forward in the treatment of head and neck cancer and is generating interest globally.
news.headline: Neutron Therapeutics and Helsinki University Hospital use accelerator-based therapy to treat head and neck cancer patients outside Asia.

news.summary: Jason Guthrie, head of product at WisdomTree, remains optimistic about the cryptocurrency market cycle despite the absence of the usual hype around phenomena like ICOs, NFTs, and DeFi lending. Previous cycles saw ICOs raise $4.9 billion in 2017, jump to $33.4 billion in 2018, then drop to $370 million by 2019. NFTs peaked in 2022 with $57.2 billion in trading volumes and 121.7 million sales count before cooling off. The market hit an all-time high of $3.71 trillion in December 2021, showing maturity with companies and countries like GameStop and Ukraine adopting crypto. Memecoin activity peaked after the launch of Trump’s memecoin but waned due to bad launches and rug pulls. Guthrie believes the market is maturing while acknowledging more innovation and early days in the crypto space.
news.headline: Crypto exec sees bullish sign in current market cycle despite lack of frothy use cases like ICOs and NFTs. ICOs raised $4.9B in 2017, peaked at $33.4B in 2018, dropped to $370M in 2019. NFTs peaked at $57.2B market sales in 2022. Overall market cap reached $3.71T on Dec. 9. Memecoin hype not as prevalent. Market maturing with adoption by companies like GameStop and countries like Ukraine. Memecoin activity surged after Trump's launch, but enthusiasm waned due to bad launches and rug pulls. Market still has room for innovation, early days but more sustainable.

news.summary: In April, blockchain gaming saw a dip in user activity, dropping 10% with 4.8 million daily Unique Active Wallets, hitting a 2025 low, as per DappRadar. The dominance of gaming in decentralized apps industry fell to 21% tying with decentralized finance. The industry is evolving as new infrastructure goes live and major publishers invest more with high-quality games nearing launch. Blockchain gaming investment plummeted by 69% to $21 million from March. Weaker projects are fading, while funds move towards sustainable models and real-world assets amidst market uncertainty. Majority of funding (66%) is directed towards infrastructure indicating market maturity. Mainstream gaming companies like Ubisoft and Sega are integrating blockchain technology. Despite a slowdown, blockchain gaming's future looks positive with ongoing development.
news.headline: Crypto gaming interest drops in April, user activity down 10% with funding at $21 million. Ecosystem evolving, focusing on quality games & infrastructure.

news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global carbon emissions have reached a record high in 2021, surging by 4.9% compared to last year. The total emissions have now surpassed 36 billion metric tons, indicating a concerning trend in the acceleration of climate change. This significant increase is primarily attributed to the resurgence of economic activities following the pandemic-induced slowdown. The data underscores the urgent need for more aggressive measures to combat climate change and reduce greenhouse gas emissions. Scientists warn that without immediate action, the global temperature could rise by more than 2 degrees Celsius, leading to irreversible consequences. The report also highlights the importance of international cooperation and commitment to achieving sustainability goals to mitigate the adverse effects of climate change.
news.headline: Company buys back 10,000 of its own shares for $100,000.

news.summary: In the month of April, Enefit Green generated a total of 185.1 gigawatt-hours (GWh) of electricity, marking a significant increase of 23.5% compared to the previous year. This rise in production can be attributed to the incorporation of new energy assets into their production lineup over the past year, notably the Sopi-Tootsi and Kelme I wind farms along with the Sopi solar farm.
news.headline: Enefit Green produced 185.1 GWh in April 2025, a 23.5% increase from last year, credited to new wind and solar farms.

news.summary: In Rotterdam, the Netherlands on May 16, 2025, IMCD N.V., a prominent distributor and formulator of specialty chemicals and ingredients worldwide, announced the signing of a deal to purchase all shares of TECOM Ingredients S.A. This acquisition marks a significant milestone for IMCD as they expand their portfolio and strengthen their presence in the industry.
news.headline: IMCD acquires 100% shares in TECOM Ingredients to enhance food & nutrition market presence in Spain.

news.summary: Eric Trump, speaking at a crypto conference in Toronto, mentioned the global competition for Bitcoin accumulation, highlighting efforts by families, government funds, and corporations to acquire the cryptocurrency. He noted the intense interest in hoarding Bitcoin, mentioning that sovereign wealth funds, wealthy families, and large companies are among those participating. Trump also highlighted the two races in Bitcoin - accumulation and mining, with his involvement in the latter through American Bitcoin, a subsidiary of Hut 8. The recent merger of American Bitcoin with Gryphon Digital Mining will result in a Nasdaq listing. The growth of Trump's family crypto ventures has raised concerns among Democrats about potential conflicts of interest and corruption. Proposed legislation and investigations have been called for to address these concerns. Senate Democrats have withdrawn their support for a stablecoin bill amid scrutiny of Trump's crypto ventures, with a potential voting session scheduled for May 26.
news.headline: Eric Trump states at a crypto conference that worldwide, everyone is racing to hoard Bitcoin. Entities from families to government funds are involved. Trump, along with Asher Genoot, discussed the notable Bitcoin adoption at Consensus 2025. Trump highlights two Bitcoin races, one led by Michael Saylor, mentioning his family's involvement through American Bitcoin. Trump's crypto ventures have stirred controversy among Democrats, concerning potential conflicts of interest. Senate Democrats have withdrawn support for a bipartisan stablecoin bill amidst investigations into Trump's crypto activities.

news.summary: Starknet, an Ethereum layer-2 scaling platform, has achieved Stage 1 decentralization set by Vitalik Buterin, making it the largest ZK-rollup-based network with a total value locked of $629 million. This milestone was achieved through implementing a security council and censorship-avoidance mechanisms. Starknet aims to reach Stage 2 decentralization, where the network becomes fully autonomous and community-governed. Only three layer-2 scaling platforms have reached this stage. In comparison, Coinbase's Base network leads the sector with $14.7 billion locked, equating to 33% market share in the ecosystem, while Starknet holds a 1.4% market share. Overall, the layer-2 ecosystem has a total value locked of $44.2 billion.
news.headline: Starknet achieves 'Stage 1' decentralization, becomes top ZK-rollup with $629M locked. Base leads with $14.7B, 33% market share. Total layer-2 value: $44.2B.

news.summary: Ash Pampati, head of ecosystem at the Aptos Foundation, believes stablecoin regulation will be the next catalyst for the crypto industry, leading to increased institutional investor interest. In a Cointelegraph interview at Consensus 2025, Pampati highlighted stablecoins' global adoption, except in the US, where potential growth awaits. Stablecoins simplify cross-border money transfers and offer a hedge against fiat devaluation, especially in emerging markets. A Fireblocks survey revealed Latin America as a leader in stablecoin use for payments, with 71% utilizing it for cross-border transactions. Additionally, 86% of surveyed firms are "infrastructure-ready" for stablecoin adoption, with 75% noting clear customer demand. Although regulatory barriers exist, confidence in stablecoins is improving worldwide due to regulatory advancements like the EU's MiCA regulation and the US' GENIUS Act. These developments point towards a promising future for stablecoin adoption in the crypto industry.
news.headline: Stablecoin regulation seen as key driver for crypto market growth, with 86% of firms ready to adopt. Source reports rising confidence in stablecoins due to regulatory progress worldwide.

news.summary: NVIDIA has introduced cutting-edge path tracing optimizations for Indiana Jones™, incorporating Opacity MicroMaps and BLAS compaction. These enhancements have led to a noteworthy increase in GPU performance and a substantial decrease in VRAM utilization. The improvements are set to revolutionize the gaming experience for users, offering smoother gameplay and enhanced graphics.
news.headline: NVIDIA boosts path tracing in Indiana Jones™ game with Opacity MicroMaps and BLAS compaction, enhancing GPU performance and cutting VRAM usage.

news.summary: Cointree, a cryptocurrency exchange, has been fined for admitting to delays in submitting suspicious activity reports. The company disclosed this information voluntarily. The fine was imposed as part of the Australian Transaction Reports and Analysis Centre's (AUSTRAC) crackdown on crypto-related activities. This move comes as AUSTRAC tightens its oversight on the cryptocurrency sector. The exact amount of the fine and the extent of the delays were not disclosed in the report.
news.headline: Cointree in Australia fined for late reports on suspicious activities, amid crypto oversight by AUSTRAC.

news.summary: On May 16, 2025, in Taipei, Advantech (TWSE: 2395), a prominent player in IoT intelligent systems and embedded platforms, revealed its plans for COMPUTEX 2025 focused on "Edge Computing & WISE-Edge in Action."
